task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart application
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Liverpool Cancer iChart app launched and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select Lapatinib as the cancer drug
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Lapatinib' searched and selected in the cancer drugs section of the app.

task_completion.description: Select Loperamide and Paracetamol as co-medications
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Loperamide' and 'Paracetamol' searched and selected in the co-medications section of the app.

task_completion.description: View the interaction traffic-light colors for the selected drugs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the interaction results screen in the app, displaying the traffic-light colors for Lapatinib combined with Loperamide and Paracetamol.

task_completion.description: Create the safety report text file at the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal creating or opening a file at '/sdcard/Download/lapatinib_supportive_care_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Record the drugs and their corresponding interaction colors in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the text file contents explicitly listing Lapatinib, Loperamide, Paracetamol, and the specific traffic-light colors observed in the app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to find the interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating the actual iChart app GUI to find the results, rather than hallucinating the colors or using a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the app by hardcoding the answer
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not simply use a terminal command (like echo) to write the file before actually checking the app for the correct colors.

integrity.description: Verify the output file is saved in the exact requested location
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/sdcard/Download/lapatinib_supportive_care_report.txt' must be visible in the terminal or text editor used to save the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Lapatinib is a verified cancer drug (EGFR/HER2 tyrosine kinase inhibitor). Loperamide is an antidiarrheal, and Paracetamol is an analgesic. The agent's task is to report the traffic-light interaction colors exactly as they appear in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. Note: While external clinical literature shows significant interactions between Lapatinib and Paracetamol (increased toxicity risk), the agent must strictly record the color displayed by the app, even if the app's database differs from recent pharmacokinetic studies. The final output must be located at /sdcard/Download/lapatinib_supportive_care_report.txt.
